name: Gain Tracker
description: Track daily git productivity or broader output gains against a historical baseline and a target multiplier, then turn the numbers into a gain scorecard or reminder story.
short_description: Connect GitHub, scan repos, and track daily gains.
audience: Builders who want daily repo activity turned into a readable progress story
Mac users comparing current output against a historical productivity baseline
Operators tracking local repos without turning the loop into a remote dashboard
detail_lines: Turns local git activity, optional GitHub identity, and baseline numbers into daily gain stories or broader scorecards.
Keeps tracked repo config under the user's Codex data area and makes repo selection explicit before measuring output.
Uses local git data first and does not store GitHub credentials or hidden telemetry in skill metadata.
